title: 60 Pieces Clothes Pegs for Washing Line Washing Line Pegs Spring for Strong Grip,Soft Clip Non Slip Laundry Clothes Pegs, Washing Pegs Designed to Avoid Marks,UV Resistant for Indoor Outdoor (60 Pack)
features: 🌈60 Soft Grip Clothes Pegs- ANGMLN’s soft grip pegs with enough 60 pieces in the package can meet the needs of the entire family, includes 4 colores: green, yellow, blue, purple, the vibrant color can revitalize your washing line!

⭐Strong & Safe- These pegs for washing line are made of high quality plastic with special spring that can securely hold even heavy and large itens of clothing on the line for drying without slipping. Designed to be gentle on clothes, soft cushioned will not leave any pressure imprints on them. Each peg has a soft anti-slip finger grip to make life that little bit easier.

🎉Perfect for Indoor & Outdoor Use- The laundry pegs are UV, water and rust resistant, colourfast, odourless, will stay by your side for years no matter whether you use them indoors or outdoors, very suitable for our great British weather.

🎉Ideal for All Types of Clothing- These washing pegs strong can hang up heavy and large lanudry pieces as jeans, jacket, bed linen, table linen, toys, or even to fix your beach towel to the beach lounger. Also suitable for small & fine pieces, such as satins, silks, woollens, shirts, tops, underwear, socks etc.
⭐Service- We provide 3 year guarantee for these plastic clothes pegs, you can contact us if there is any issues, we will solve it within 24 hours
description: Product Description ANGMLN Soft Clip Non Slip Laundry Clothes Pegs --for Washing Line Multicolor Strong Clothes Pegs for Home Washing Pegs Designed to Avoid Marks --4 Color: (Green-white/Yellow-white/Blue-white/Purple-white) --Cute & Warm Design: The laundry pegs with pastel coloues and clarity of shapes make hanging clothes a pleasure EXQUISITE GARE MADE EASY Clothes Pegs for Washing Line Washing Pegs with Durable Spring ——PP Material： 1.Eco-Conscious 2.Exceptional Durability 3.Superior Weather Resistance Lightweight 4.Easy Handling& Safe ——Windproof Design：Engineered specifically to combat clothes being blown off the line, this feature ensures items stay securely fastened even in blustery conditions. ——Thicker Spring Clips：At the heart of the peg's clamping power lies a thicker, reinforced spring clip made from high-grade spring steel. ——Anti-slip Caring Design：The gripping surfaces (jaws) of the peg are specially designed to hold items firmly without damaging them or slipping. 4 Colors Washing Line Pegs Plastic Non Slip Laundry Pegs 4 Vibrant Colours Grip & Protect Laundry UV Resistant for Indoor & Outdoor All Weather Pegs
